query:
SELECT id, team, day, 
  CASE 
    WHEN imageUrl LIKE 'data:%' THEN 'BASE64_URL'
    WHEN imageUrl = '__db__' THEN 'PLACEHOLDER'
    WHEN imageUrl LIKE '/api/screenshot/%' THEN 'API_URL'
    WHEN imageUrl IS NULL THEN 'NULL'
    ELSE LEFT(imageUrl, 60)
  END as imageUrl_type,
  CASE WHEN imageData IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_DATA' ELSE 'NO_DATA' END as imageData_status
FROM schedule_screenshots;
command:

  END as imageUrl_type,
